limitations: Known false negatives and false positives remain in held-out testing.
partial_fabrication.user_facing_summary_detected: Experimental partial-fabrication evidence was detected. The highlighted segment is a candidate region for manual forensic review; this is not a conclusive authenticity decision.
partial_fabrication.user_facing_summary_not_detected: No partial-fabrication evidence was detected by the experimental partial module. This does not prove the audio is authentic; subtle or unseen partial manipulations may still be missed.
partial_fabrication.user_facing_summary_unavailable: Partial-fabrication analysis was unavailable for this file. Manual forensic review is recommended if partial manipulation is suspected.
